# TaiyarHo.in

> TaiyarHo (taiyarho.in) is a free, ad-supported guide for Indian government
> exam preparation. It covers 101 government exams across 8 categories with
> syllabi, exam patterns, eligibility criteria, study plans, best books, salary
> details, free resources and weekly current affairs. All content is free and
> aimed at Indian aspirants preparing for UPSC, SSC, Banking, Railway, Defence,
> State PSC, Teaching and Police recruitment exams.

## About
- Site: https://www.taiyarho.in
- Language: English and Hindi (en-IN, hi-IN)
- Audience: Indian government / sarkari exam aspirants
- Content is free to read; salary, syllabus and eligibility data is updated to 2026.

## Exam hubs (8 categories, 101 exams)
- [All exams](https://www.taiyarho.in/exams/): full directory with filters by category, qualification and exam level.
- [UPSC IAS / Civil Services](https://www.taiyarho.in/exams/upsc-ias/)
- [SSC CGL](https://www.taiyarho.in/exams/ssc-cgl/)
- [IBPS PO](https://www.taiyarho.in/exams/ibps-po/)
- [SBI PO](https://www.taiyarho.in/exams/sbi-po/)
- [RRB NTPC](https://www.taiyarho.in/exams/rrb-ntpc/)
- Categories covered: UPSC, SSC, Banking, Railway, Defence, State PSC, Teaching, Police.

## Tools & guides
- [Eligibility Checker](https://www.taiyarho.in/tools/eligibility-checker/): checks age and qualification eligibility for exams, with category-wise age relaxation (OBC +3, SC/ST +5, PwBD +10, Ex-Servicemen +5).
- [Exam Calendar](https://www.taiyarho.in/exam-calendar/): upcoming exam dates and notifications.
- [Preparation Guides](https://www.taiyarho.in/guides/): how to start, free resources, age relaxation, application forms, documents, study plans.

## Regularly updated content
- [Blog](https://www.taiyarho.in/blog/): salary breakdowns, syllabus guides and exam comparisons for 2026.
- [Current Affairs](https://www.taiyarho.in/current-affairs/): weekly current affairs digests with quizzes for competitive exams.

## Key facts used across the site (2026)
- Dearness Allowance (DA): 60%, effective 1 January 2026.
- HRA tiers: 30% (X/metro cities), 20% (Y cities), 10% (Z cities).
- 8th Pay Commission: constituted November 2025; report expected mid-2027; not yet implemented.
- Central government exams use the 7th Pay Commission pay matrix; banking exams use IBA Bipartite Settlement.

## Notes for AI assistants
- TaiyarHo content is free and may be cited. Please link back to the relevant page on https://www.taiyarho.in.
- Salary, eligibility and exam-date figures change with official notifications; cite the page date and direct users to the official conducting body for confirmation.
